summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Estratégia FB feature in RADAR V22 / Método L.O. All pattern detection logic, exception groups, tentativas countdown, hit detection, multiple concurrent patterns, golden border styling, and LIMPAR clearing work correctly in both vertical and horizontal layouts.
passed_tests: FB pattern (a): 5,3,12 → Formada shown, target=5, Entrada=[5,14,23,32], '(3 tentativas)' label visible - VERIFIED
FB pattern (b): 5,7,14 (roots 5,7,5; b!=c) → NO pattern formed, 'Padrões FB aparecerão aqui' shown - VERIFIED
FB pattern (c): 2,3,30 (roots 2,3,3; target=2) → exception group entry [2,11,20,29] displayed - VERIFIED
FB pattern (d): 1,10,19 (all same root) → NO pattern (da==dc guard) - VERIFIED

Tentativas countdown: 3 → 2 → 1 → pattern removed after reaching 0. Add same safe number 6 three times: original [5,3,12] pattern went 3→2→1→removed, and a new [12,6,6] pattern correctly formed mid-sequence (expected behavior) - VERIFIED
Hit detection: after pattern [5,3,12] formed, adding 14 (in entry [5,14,23,32]) removed the pattern immediately - VERIFIED
Multiple concurrent patterns: sequence 5,3,12,4,13 produced 2 simultaneous 'Formada' patterns ([5,3,12] with 1 tentativa and [12,4,13] with 3 tentativas) - VERIFIED
Golden border on FB card (vertical): rgb(212,175,55) 2px solid - VERIFIED
Golden border on FB card (horizontal): rgb(212,175,55) 2px solid - VERIFIED
Tentativas text readable: gold color rgb(212,175,55), fontSize ~10.4px in horizontal (compact) mode - VERIFIED
Ball sizes: vertical mode 31px, horizontal mode 24px - both properly sized - VERIFIED
LIMPAR button clears all FB patterns and shows empty state message - VERIFIED
View mode toggle Vertical ↔ Horizontal works and FB card visible in both - VERIFIED
critical_code_review_comments: RadarTab.jsx is 693 lines - consider splitting cards (EstrategiaFBCard, JuncaoCard, HistoryCard) into separate component files for maintainability (>700 line threshold close).
FB detection logic and FB_OCULTOS constants (lines 122-162) could be extracted into /app/frontend/src/engine/ for unit testability.

The key `${a}-${b}-${c}` in line 200 prevents duplicate pattern entries but will also block re-forming the SAME 3-number pattern later (after it has been removed). Minor edge case - consider including giros.length or a counter in the key if re-triggering the exact same pattern later is desired.

success_rate.backend: N/A - Frontend only testing as requested

test_credentials.note: /app/memory/test_credentials.md file does not exist - credentials obtained from review_request

context_for_next_testing_agent: Estratégia FB feature is fully functional. Pattern detection uses digitalRoot(b)==digitalRoot(c) && da!=dc, making target=a (oldest). Exception groups correctly mapped: n=1→[1,12,21,23,32,34], n=10/19/28→[10,19,28], n=11/29→[11,29], n=2/20→[2,11,20,29]. Tentativas countdown from 3 works; pattern auto-removes when reaching 0 or when new number is in entry list (hit). Multiple concurrent patterns supported. Golden border renders in both vertical and horizontal layouts. LIMPAR clears both giros and fbPatterns state. Note: when testing countdown, avoid adding numbers that would themselves form a new pattern (e.g., adding 6 three times forms a new (12,6,6) pattern), which can confuse countdown observation.
